{{Infobox character
| name = Tomas Stillwell
| aliases = Stillwell
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tomas Stillwell]] is the Head of the Greenwarden’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Stillwell is onboard with a deal for peace between the [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tomas Stillwell]] took the [[Greenwardens]] and left the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
